_comment: PipeCrew plugin hooks. Auto-loaded by Claude Code when the plugin is installed. The single hook below installs the troubleshooter bash guard as a PreToolUse intercept on the Bash tool. The guard self-gates on a marker file (~/.claude/.pipecrew-troubleshooter-active) — when no /troubleshoot run is active, it exits 0 immediately, so this hook has zero effect on every other agent in the user's environment. See scripts/troubleshooter-bash-guard.js for the full enforcement logic and skills/troubleshoot/SKILL.md for the marker create/cleanup contract.
